summary.intent: Fix and resolve all open PR comments on PR #653 (feat/deterministic-compaction), specifically a P1 Greptile-flagged bug in extract_summary_body under iterative structured re-compaction.
summary.outcome: The bug fix was implemented and validated locally (227 chat + 185 config tests green, fmt + clippy clean), and the prior commit (354518be) was pushed successfully. The fix commit was ready but blocked on GPG/YubiKey signing; the user was asked to run the commit manually.

repo: PR #653 had 7 review threads total: 6 resolved in prior rounds, 1 unresolved (iterative compaction bug).

extract_summary_body scanned left-to-right, returning the stale previous-compaction summary when iterative structured mode places the new summary at head_end and the old one at compacted[0]. Fix: iterate in .rev().
CompactionOutcome::broadcast_metadata and format_channel_compaction_notice were extended with include_settings_hint flags to support the new chat.compaction.show_settings_hint config knob.
The web UI renderCompactCard already had an if (data.settingsHint) guard, so no frontend changes were needed for the settings hint feature.
Greptile thread ID for the unresolved P1: PRRT_kwDOREW6tc56TYrC on PR #653.

code.finding: extract_summary_body must iterate messages in reverse (.rev()) so the newest [Conversation Summary] message wins during iterative re-compaction, not the stale one at compacted[0].

workflow: GPG-signed commits fail in non-TTY shell environments because pinentry cannot fall back to terminal input — a GUI PIN prompt is launched instead.
YubiKey is required for both SSH push signing and GPG commit signing; both can block automated flows.
Greptile PR threads can be resolved via GraphQL: gh api graphql -f query='mutation { resolveReviewThread(input: {threadId: "..."}) { thread { isResolved } } }'
cargo +nightly-2025-11-30 is the pinned toolchain for fmt, clippy, and tests in this repo.

friction: YubiKey not inserted/available during initial push attempt, requiring manual retry.
GPG commit signing failed in non-TTY shell context — pinentry GUI prompt was cancelled, blocking automated commit.
Both SSH push and GPG signing require physical YubiKey interaction, creating multiple interruption points in automated workflows.
open_items: Resolve Greptile review thread PRRT_kwDOREW6tc56TYrC via GraphQL after the fix commit lands.
Confirm the fix commit and push completed successfully after user ran the manual git commands.
